accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text and the FWS rule.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the rule's content is accurately described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as using CRA authority to nullify the lesser prairie-chicken listing rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval does not amend existing statutes.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date beyond enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative disapproval provision and its legal effect.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and rule title.

correct_figures.why: Correctly cites November 25, 2022 and May 3, 2023 Senate passage.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
